data.body: Related operational cleanup: the sole live `unbound_jira` binding drift the canary was (correctly) trying to alert on was REB-532 — a leftover experiment issue ('EXPERIMENT (delete me): assignee clobber repro', empty rebar-id: label, no local binding). Deleted it in Jira via acli; the drift clears on the next reconciler snapshot refresh. This is why the canary saw drift all day (and thus exercised the failing rebar create write path). The .env-id fix (Gerrit change 285) is the durable fix for any future drift.
